ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Newsletter – New Features & Exclusive Offers
ham.body:
Hello Valued Subscriber,

Thank you for staying connected with us. Here’s your weekly roundup of the latest product enhancements, upcoming events, and special deals you don’t want to miss.

**What’s New This Week**
- **Feature X**: Unlock advanced analytics with a single click.
- **Improved Mobile UI**: Seamless experience across all devices.
- **API Update**: Faster response times for all endpoints.

**Upcoming Webinar**
Join us on Friday, 18 April at 2:00 PM PST for an in‑depth walkthrough of Feature X. Reserve your spot here: <URL>

**Exclusive Offer**
For our newsletter subscribers only: Upgrade to Premium in the next 48 hours and receive a 20 % discount. Use coupon code: WEEKLY20 at checkout.

We appreciate your continued support and look forward to helping you maximize your workflow.

Best regards,
Marketing Team

P.S. Have questions? Reply to this email or contact our support at support@example.com.

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Join Your Scheduled Zoom Meeting
spam.body:
Dear [First Name],

This is an automated notice from the IT Security Department. Your Zoom meeting titled "Quarterly Review – Q1 Results" is scheduled to commence in 15 minutes.

Meeting ID: 123‑456‑7890
Password: Q1Sec2026

Click the link below to join immediately:
<URL>

If you are unable to join, please reschedule by clicking the same link or contact the IT helpdesk at ithelp@example.com.

Failure to attend this mandatory meeting may result in a review of your access privileges.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
John Doe
IT Security Lead
Example Corp
